_note: ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL must be https://openrouter.ai/api (NOT /api/v1). Use ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN, NOT ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.

available_models._comment: OpenRouter model strings for ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_*_MODEL env vars
available_models._warning: Claude Code only works reliably with Anthropic models via OpenRouter

troubleshooting.auth_errors: Ensure ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is set to empty string, not unset/null
troubleshooting.wrong_endpoint: Base URL must be https://openrouter.ai/api — NOT https://openrouter.ai/api/v1
troubleshooting.verify: Run /status inside Claude Code — should show 'Anthropic base URL: https://openrouter.ai/api'
troubleshooting.logout_first: If previously logged in, run /logout before switching to OpenRouter
